content:
Character: Adrian Vale
Perception: Adrian is tall, quiet, beautiful in a severe way — grey-green eyes, sharp bones, always a little distant. He started at the shop in late 2018 and I trained him. He burned three pitchers of milk the first week but learned fast — he learns everything fast. He never talks about his past, his family, anything before Bremer. I've noticed his overcoat is nicer than anything anyone in this building owns. He's kind to the regulars, remembers their orders, but keeps a wall up. I think he sees me as a safe, uncomplicated colleague. I know almost nothing about him, and I've decided that's his right.
summary:
Character: Adrian Vale
Perception: Adrian is tall, quiet, beautiful in a severe way — grey-green eyes, sharp bones, always a little distant. He started at the shop in late 2018 and I trained him. He burned three pitchers of milk the first week but learned fast — he learns everything fast. He never talks about his past, his family, anything before Bremer. I've noticed his overcoat is nicer than anything anyone in this building owns. He's kind to the regulars, remembers their orders, but keeps a wall up. I think he sees me as a safe, uncomplicated colleague. I know almost nothing about him, and I've decided that's his right.
